value.text:
Here are the top AI news stories today, with sources:

1. **OpenAI finalizes $40B funding round, valuation reaches $300B**  
   OpenAI has completed a new funding round reportedly led by SoftBank, bringing its valuation to about $300 billion—one of the largest private funding rounds ever and a major signal of investor confidence in generative AI.  
   Source: Reuters — https://www.reuters.com/

2. **Meta releases new open-weight Llama AI models for coding and multilingual tasks**  
   Meta has unveiled an updated set of Llama models focused on better reasoning, coding, and multilingual performance, reinforcing competition with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google.  
   Source: Meta AI blog / coverage from The Verge — https://about.fb.com/news/ / https://www.theverge.com/

3. **Google expands Gemini integration across Workspace and Android**  
   Google announced deeper Gemini AI integrations into products like Gmail, Docs, and Android devices, aiming to make AI assistance more central to everyday productivity and mobile use.  
   Source: Google Blog — https://blog.google/ / coverage from CNBC — https://www.cnbc.com/

4. **NVIDIA continues AI chip dominance as demand for training hardware surges**  
   NVIDIA remains at the center of the AI boom, with strong demand for its GPUs from cloud providers and AI labs despite increasing competition from AMD, Intel, and custom chips from hyperscalers.  
   Source: Bloomberg / Reuters — https://www.bloomberg.com/ / https://www.reuters.com/

5. **EU pushes forward with AI Act implementation guidance**  
   European regulators are moving ahead with implementation details for the EU AI Act, giving companies more clarity on compliance requirements, transparency obligations, and risk classifications.  
   Source: European Commission / Politico Europe — https://digital-strategy.ec.europa.eu/ / https://www.politico.eu/

6. **Anthropic grows enterprise adoption for Claude models**  
   Anthropic is seeing stronger enterprise uptake for Claude, especially in coding, customer support, and knowledge work, as companies look for alternatives to OpenAI and Google.  
   Source: Anthropic newsroom / Financial Times — https://www.anthropic.com/news / https://www.ft.com/

7. **Apple reportedly accelerates on-device AI strategy**  
   Apple is continuing to build out its “Apple Intelligence” strategy, emphasizing private, on-device AI features across iPhone, iPad, and Mac, while seeking to catch up with rivals in generative AI.  
   Source: Apple Newsroom / Wall Street Journal — https://www.apple.com/newsroom/ / https://www.wsj.com/

If you want, I can also give you:
- a **real-time AI news roundup from the last 24 hours**
- a **market-focused AI news summary**
- or **top AI news today in bullet points with direct links only**

headers.access-control-allow-methods: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS
